summary.tagline: Real-time audio visualizer with 10+ modes and 640 combinations
summary.description: A browser-based audio-reactive visualizer powered by Canvas 2D and the Web Audio API. 10 visualization modes, 4 overlay effects, and 4 sky arc modes combine into 640 unique visual combos. Drag-and-drop music loading, keyboard shortcuts, fullscreen Vibe Mode, and queue management — all in zero-dependency vanilla JS.
features: 10 visualization modes (bars, waveform, circular, particles, starfield, pixel grid, sunset, starry night, piano, blank)
640 possible combinations via 4 overlay effects and 4 sky arc modes
Drag-and-drop audio loading (mp3, wav, flac, ogg, m4a, aac, webm)
Vibe Mode — fullscreen immersion with auto-hiding UI and cursor
Mouse particle effects and interactive sun dragging
Queue management panel with track reordering
summary.architecture: Single-page app: HTML5 Canvas rendering loop driven by Web Audio AnalyserNode FFT frequency data. Node.js static server with /api/tracks endpoint that scans categorized subdirectories. Each visualizer is a standalone draw() function module. Effects (sun arc, lo-fi grid, amp bars, mouse particles) layer on top of any visualizer.
